prompt:
A photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s sitting on a cushioned window bench in a sunlit modern home, knees drawn up. Late morning. She holds ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE delicately between her thumb and index finger, lifting it toward her parted lips, mid-bite. She wears soft cream knit and oat-colored loungewear, hair loosely tied back, no makeup, natural skin.

A WARM SHAFT OF NATURAL SUNLIGHT pours through the large window directly onto the JAR sitting on the wooden window sill / bench beside her — the sunlight visibly hits the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan accents, the bold yellow lettering, and grazing the curved black plastic side with a soft rim-light. The light wraps around the jar so the label is the brightest, most clearly-lit part of the image. A few sugar-dusted gummy CUBES scattered around the jar on the sill also catch direct sunlight. The jar must be a faithful match of the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible, recognizable.

Background: warm-wood window frame, soft white linen curtain pushed aside, a glimpse of green leaves outside the window, slightly out-of-focus interior with a beige throw blanket and one small potted plant.

Lighting: directional warm natural sunlight from the window directly on the jar AND on the woman's face/hand — the SAME beam wraps both subject and product so they sit in the same light environment, integrating naturally. Color grade is warm, airy, editorial wellness-brand feel (Athletic Greens / Hims / Goop).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman seated, gummy held in the upper-third near her face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the sill with sunlight directly on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural skin texture, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
